title: Dashboard enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Date filter keyboard input**: Fixed an issue where entering a date value via keyboard for relative date ranges failed to accept the input.
* **Dashboard theme color palette**: Fixed a bug where the visualization color palette was hidden when editing dashboard themes at the workspace level.
* **Pivot table column width**: The minimum width of pivot table columns is now 30px, reduced from 50px.
* **Drill-through for pivot tables**: Drill-through filters are now available for pivot tables. See [Use drill-through to filter data](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/filters#drill-through-filter).
* **Dashboard snapshot audit logs**: Fixed a bug where audit logs for `triggerDashboardSnapshot` included internal system calls from thumbnail generation and probe snapshots. These internal requests are now excluded from the audit logs.
* **Genie Code dataset refresh**: Fixed a bug where Genie Code endlessly retried reading dataset results after updating a dataset's SQL.
* **Genie Code dual y-axis charts**: Genie Code now generates dual y-axis bar, line, and area charts correctly.
* **Custom font data labels**: Custom dashboard fonts now apply to data point labels.
* **Forecast x-axis time binning**: Forecast visualizations now properly apply x-axis time binning.
* **Pivot table date cell formatting**: Pivot table date cells no longer wrap at hyphens.
* **Ask Genie to explain chart changes**: Users can now right-click on bar, line, and area time series visualizations (including multi-series and stacked charts) and ask Genie to explain changes. Genie enters Agent mode to analyze the change and identify top drivers. See [Ask Genie to explain chart changes](/aws/en/dashboards/genie-spaces#explain-chart-changes).
* **Dashboard subscription audit logs**: Audit logs now include the `sendDashboardSnapshot` event when a dashboard subscription sends a snapshot to a Slack or Teams destination. See [AI/BI dashboard events](/aws/en/admin/account-settings/audit-logs#dashboards).

ref_links.text: Ask Genie to explain chart changes
